summary: New Homepage Features Testing Complete - All 5 new features implemented and working correctly. Winner Gallery shows real winners from DB. Exit Intent Popup triggers on mouse leave for non-logged-in users. Daily Quests Widget shows for logged-in users with quest items and progress bars. VIP Promo Banner correctly shows only for non-VIP logged-in users. All backend APIs working (11/11 tests passed).

issues: Quest names showing internal type names (watch_auction, spin_wheel, visit_page) instead of localized names - minor UX issue

backend_api.winners_endpoint: PASS - /api/winners returns 200 with list of winners
backend_api.winners_structure: PASS - Winner data includes winner_name, final_price, product info
backend_api.daily_quests_data: PASS - Returns quests array with id, target, progress, reward_bids
backend_api.daily_quests_reset: PASS - Includes date and seconds_until_reset fields

winner_gallery.details: Renders when winners exist in DB. Shows winner name, product, price, savings. Has data-testid='winner-gallery'

exit_intent_popup.details: Triggers on mouse leave (clientY <= 0) for non-logged-in users. Shows '5 Gratis-Gebote' offer with registration CTA. Has data-testid='exit-intent-popup'

daily_quests_widget.details: Shows for logged-in users only. Displays 'Tägliche Quests' title, quest items with progress bars (0/1), rewards (+X Gebote). Has data-testid='daily-quests-widget'

vip_promo_banner.details: Correctly shows only for non-VIP logged-in users (condition: isAuthenticated && !user?.is_vip). Has data-testid='vip-promo-banner'

personalized_recommendations.details: Still works correctly with all new components. Shows 'Für dich empfohlen' with personalized greeting

page_load.details: Homepage loads without errors with all new components integrated

critical_code_review_comments: Daily Quests Widget shows internal quest type names (watch_auction, spin_wheel) instead of localized display names - the backend returns name/name_de/name_en but frontend fallback shows type
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - using existing data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 new homepage features tested and working: 1) Winner Gallery shows at /api/winners with real winner data, 2) Exit Intent Popup triggers on mouse leave for non-logged users, 3) Daily Quests Widget shows for logged-in users at /api/daily/quests, 4) VIP Promo Banner shows for non-VIP logged-in users, 5) VIP Badge component available for use. Note: Both admin and manager test users are VIP, so VIP banner won't show for them.
